element_type: e-flexbox (Hero: 1 e-flexbox + 1 e-div-block + heading + paragraph + 1 e-flexbox + button)

content.value: Feel better, live lighter, one step at a time
A balanced approach to wellness that supports your body, improves energy, and fits naturally into your daily life.

schema_observations.bug_2_confirmed: All atomic widgets use elType='widget' with widgetType (e-heading, e-paragraph, e-button)
schema_observations.bug_3_4_5_confirmed: title, paragraph, text all use $$type 'html-v3'; classes always { $$type: 'classes', value: [...] }
schema_observations.e_button_text_confirmed: e-button text is { $$type: 'html-v3', value: { content: {...}, children: [] } } (same shape as e-heading title)
schema_observations.e_button_link_simplified: On 1953 link is a plain string '/services' (unwrapped) — likely because the hero is minimal; 1950 shows the full wrapped shape: { $$type: 'link', value: { href: { $$type: 'string', value: '...' }, isTargetBlank: { $$type: 'boolean', value: false }, tag: { $$type: 'string', value: 'a' } } }
schema_observations.container_link_default: Containers (e-flexbox/e-div-block) may have settings.link: { $$type: 'link', value: [] } when no link is set — the empty array is the default
schema_observations.kebab_case_class_ids: Class IDs on 1953 use 'e-s-hero-local' (kebab-case with 'e-' prefix and '-local' suffix). This is the local-class pattern documented in 'elementor-add-element' description: 'for v4 atomic elements with synthesized local styles, the rendered CSS class is s-<element_id>'. The 'e-s-hero-local' id is the value of the local style, not the element_id itself — see 1950 for the canonical 'e-{elementId}-{8hexHash}' pattern.
schema_observations.no_g_classes: Hero page 1953 uses ONLY local classes (no 'g-...' global class refs) — confirms that local-only builds are valid and rendered correctly
